Included With Your Promo Listing

The Most Powerful CRM for Fanvue

Manage every fan conversation, track PPV revenue per subscriber, build AI psychological profiles, A/B test mass messages, and manage your team — in your browser or our native desktop app. All connected to the official Fanvue API.

9+ Dashboard Sections
50+ Features
AI-Powered Intelligence
Included With Listing
Desktop App Available
Get StartedDownload Desktop App

Everything You Need to Grow

Nine fully-featured sections, real Fanvue API data, AI intelligence, and tools no other platform offers. Use it in your browser or download our desktop app.

Real-Time Messaging CRM

Full 3-panel chat interface connected to Fanvue. Send messages, PPV content, attach vault media, and auto-poll for new messages every 5 seconds.

AI Psychological Profiles

Generate comprehensive personality analyses for any fan — communication style, emotional triggers, spending patterns, and engagement strategies.

Advanced Analytics

Earnings by source, monthly trends, subscriber growth, LTV calculations, percentile rankings, day-of-week analysis, and interactive charts.

PPV Tracking Per Fan

See every PPV message sent to each fan with purchase status, conversion rates, earned vs. pending revenue, thumbnails, and timestamps.

Mass Messaging + A/B Tests

Broadcast to smart lists, exclude audiences, set PPV pricing, and split-test variants to maximize open rates and purchases.

Employee Management

Invite chatters, managers, and admins with granular permissions. Schedule shifts, track messages, revenue, and response times per employee.

Vault Media Manager

Browse, upload, organize, and stream your entire Fanvue vault. Create folders, manage captions and pricing, attach media everywhere.

Tracking Link Attribution

Create branded tracking links per social platform. Measure clicks, subscriber acquisitions, follower conversions, and revenue per link.

Multi-Account Management

Link and switch between multiple Fanvue creator accounts instantly. Ideal for agencies managing several profiles from one dashboard.

Flagship Feature

A Complete Messaging CRM

Not just a chat window — a full customer relationship management system built around every fan conversation. Three-panel layout with chat list, message area, and a rich fan intelligence sidebar.

Chat Management

  • Real-time messaging synced with Fanvue every 5 seconds
  • Send PPV messages with custom pricing directly from chat
  • Attach vault media — images, videos, audio, documents
  • Search across all conversations with instant results
  • Sort by most recent, online now, or most unanswered

Smart Filtering & Tags

  • Filter: Unread, Subscribers, Followers, Tippers, Online
  • Tag fans as Whales or Time Wasters for instant prioritization
  • Assign chats to AI, specific managers, or chatters
  • Bulk selection mode for mass assignment across chats

AI Intelligence

  • One-click AI reply suggestions based on full conversation context
  • Ask AI anything about a fan — inferred from chat history and notes
  • Full psychological profile generation per individual fan

Fan Intelligence Sidebar — 4 Tabs

Details

Total spent, PPV revenue, tips, top single purchase
Subscription status, duration, cost, auto-renewal
Custom nicknames and categorized notes
AI Q&A — ask anything about this fan

Psych Profile

AI-generated psychological analysis: personality traits, communication style, emotional triggers, spending behavior, engagement strategies, and red flags. One click to generate a comprehensive fan profile.

PPV History

Every PPV message you sent to this fan with thumbnails, prices, purchase status (bought vs. not opened), conversion rate bar, earned vs. pending revenue, and timestamps. Never send duplicate content.

Pinned Messages

Pin important messages for quick reference. Right-click any message to pin it. Access all pinned messages in one place for each conversation.

Real-Time Data from Fanvue API

Analytics That Actually Matter

Every data point pulled live from the Fanvue API. Four analytics tabs covering earnings, subscribers, and content.

Earnings Overview

  • All-time net earnings with sparkline
  • Current month revenue
  • Average subscriber LTV
  • Creator percentile ranking

Source Breakdown

  • Revenue by: Subs, Renewals, Messages, Posts, Tips, Referrals
  • Interactive donut chart
  • Best-earning day of week

Subscriber Intelligence

  • Current subscriber & follower count
  • Daily new subscriber chart
  • Top spenders leaderboard with avatars
  • Churn monitoring

Content Performance

  • Total posts, images, videos, audio
  • PPV post counts
  • Recent transactions feed
  • Monthly earnings breakdown
Unique Feature

Mass Messages with A/B Testing

The only Fanvue tool that lets you split-test your mass messages. Create multiple variants with different text, pricing, and audiences — then compare results to find what converts best.

Smart list targeting: Auto-Renewing, Expired, Spent $50+, Free Trial, and more

PPV pricing on broadcasts for direct monetization at scale

Attach vault media or upload files directly to messages

A/B test campaigns with 2+ variants and independent tracking

Per-variant analytics: opens, purchases, revenue, conversion rate

Automatic winner detection based on highest revenue variant

Employee Management

Role-based permissions: Chatter, Manager, Admin
Shift scheduling with status tracking
Performance: messages, revenue, response time
Team leaderboard ranked by earnings

Vault Media Manager

Browse all vault folders with thumbnail grid
Inline video playback and audio waveforms
Create, rename, and organize folders
Set recommended prices and captions

Tracking Links

Click tracking per social platform
Subscriber & follower acquisition per link
Revenue attribution per campaign
Conversion rates and revenue per click

Complete Feature List

Every capability included with your FanvueModels promo listing. No hidden tiers, no paywalls, no limits. Available in your browser and as a desktop app.

Overview Dashboard

  • Real-time subscriber and follower counts
  • Net earnings (last 30 days)
  • Click trend charts by day
  • Geographic breakdown of visitors
  • Recent earnings transaction feed
  • Listing status and plan management

Earnings Analytics

  • All-time and current-month net earnings
  • Average subscriber lifetime value
  • Creator percentile ranking
  • Earnings by day-of-week analysis
  • Interactive donut charts by source
  • Monthly earnings breakdown table

Messaging CRM

  • Real-time chat with 5-second polling
  • Send PPV messages with custom pricing
  • Vault media picker integration
  • AI reply suggestions
  • Smart filters and sorting
  • Employee chat assignment

AI Features

  • Psychological fan profiles
  • AI Q&A about any fan
  • AI reply suggestions in chat
  • Powered by advanced language models

PPV Intelligence

  • PPV history per fan with thumbnails
  • Bought vs. not-opened status
  • Conversion rate tracking
  • Earned vs. pending revenue
  • Prevents sending duplicate content

Mass Messaging

  • Smart list and custom list targeting
  • Audience exclusion lists
  • PPV pricing on broadcasts
  • Full send history with stats
  • A/B test campaigns with winner detection

Employee System

  • Invite via shareable link
  • Chatter, Manager, Admin roles
  • Granular permission controls
  • Shift scheduling with time tracking
  • Performance leaderboard
  • Revenue per employee tracking

Vault Management

  • Browse all folders with media counts
  • Chunked multi-part upload
  • Video player and audio waveforms
  • Edit captions and recommended prices
  • Grid and list view modes
  • Filter by media type

Tracking & Attribution

  • Create branded tracking links
  • Per-platform icons (TikTok, IG, X, etc.)
  • Click, subscriber, follower attribution
  • Revenue per click and per subscriber
  • Multi-column sortable analytics

Posts Management

  • Create posts with media and PPV pricing
  • Audience targeting (subscribers vs. all)
  • Likes, comments, and tip stats
  • Gallery and list view modes
  • Draft and scheduled post toggling

Fan & Subscriber Lists

  • Paginated subscriber and follower lists
  • Top spenders leaderboard with medals
  • Spending behavior breakdown per fan
  • Subscription status and duration

Security & Architecture

  • Official Fanvue OAuth 2.0 with PKCE
  • Your credentials are never stored
  • Encrypted tokens with auto-refresh
  • Role-based access control for teams
  • Native desktop app for Win/Mac/Linux
  • Mobile responsive design

Get Started in 3 Steps

STEP 01

List Your Profile

Create your FanvueModels listing and unlock the full CRM dashboard.

STEP 02

Connect Fanvue

One-click OAuth connection. Fully secure, instant setup.

STEP 03

Manage Everything

Messages, analytics, mass messaging, employees & more — all unlocked.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is the CRM included with my listing?
Yes — all 50+ CRM features are unlocked when you create your FanvueModels promo listing. No separate subscription, no feature limits, no hidden tiers. You also get access to the native desktop app for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
How does the CRM connect to my Fanvue account?
Through the official Fanvue OAuth 2.0 API with PKCE security. You authorize access once by clicking "Connect Fanvue" in the dashboard. Your password is never shared or stored — only encrypted API tokens that auto-refresh.
What AI features are included?
Three AI tools: (1) Psychological fan profiles that analyze personality traits, communication style, and spending patterns. (2) AI Q&A where you can ask anything about a fan based on their chat history and notes. (3) AI reply suggestions in conversations.
Can I manage multiple Fanvue accounts?
Yes. Link as many Fanvue creator accounts as you need and switch between them instantly. This is designed for agencies and creators managing several profiles.
What is A/B testing for mass messages?
Create 2+ variants of a mass message with different text, pricing, or target audiences. Send them independently, then compare open rates, purchase rates, and revenue across variants. The system auto-identifies the winning variant.
Is my data secure?
All communication uses HTTPS encryption. OAuth tokens are stored encrypted with automatic refresh. We use role-based access control for team members, and your Fanvue credentials are never transmitted through our servers.
Do I need technical knowledge to use this?
Not at all. The dashboard is designed for creators, not developers. Everything is visual with intuitive interfaces — from sending PPV messages to scheduling employee shifts to generating AI profiles. You can use it in your browser or download the desktop app for a native experience.
Is there a desktop app?
Yes! Fanvue CRM is available as a native desktop app for Windows, macOS (Intel and Apple Silicon), and Linux. The desktop app offers a faster, always-accessible experience with system notifications. Download it for free from the download section below.
Desktop App

Download Fanvue CRM

Native desktop experience. Faster, always accessible, with system notifications.

Windows

64-bit · 1.8 MB

.exe Setup

macOS Intel

x64 · 3.3 MB

.dmg

macOS Apple Silicon

ARM64 · 3.2 MB

.dmg

Linux

Ubuntu/Debian · 2.9 MB

.deb

Version 1.7 · All platforms require a FanvueModels account

⚠️

Important for macOS users

After downloading the .dmg file, macOS may block the app from opening. To fix this, open Terminal and run:

xattr -cr /Applications/Fanvue\ CRM.app

This removes the macOS quarantine flag and allows the app to run normally. You only need to do this once after the first install.

Ready to Take Control?

Join creators who use FanvueModels to manage every fan relationship, maximize PPV revenue, and grow their business — in the browser or our desktop app.

Get Started Now

All features included with your promo listing. Desktop app available for Windows, macOS & Linux.
